description: Silver coloured steel case with a fixed bezel for durability, style and comfortStainless steel strap with a linked design, bead work and a press claspBlue mother of pearl dial with silver handstitan logo at the 6 hour markScrew to reset timeSolid case back for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 30 meters, allowing you to use it even when showering Warranty: 2 years
